AppLayout.description: Root layout component with sidebar navigation, header, and content area

ThemeProvider.description: Everforest dark/light theme provider with CSS custom properties and toggle

useKeyboardNav.description: Hook for vim-style keyboard navigation (hjkl, /, :, g, Enter, Esc, Tab)

queryClient.description: Pre-configured TanStack Query client with default stale time and retry settings

useProjectStore.description: Zustand store for active project selection and project list state

TooltipOverlay.description: Keyboard shortcut helper overlay toggled with ? key

apiClient.description: Typed fetch wrapper with base URL configuration and error handling

everforest_palette.description: All colors must use Everforest palette tokens (bg_dim, bg0, bg1, fg, green, aqua, etc.) via CSS custom properties, never raw hex values in components

keyboard_first.description: Every navigation action must be reachable via keyboard shortcut; mouse is secondary

responsive_layout.description: Layout must function at minimum 1024px width; sidebar collapses below 768px

definition.scope: React 19 + Vite 8 SPA skeleton with Everforest dark theme (light toggle), Tailwind CSS 4.2 configuration, vim-style keyboard navigation, global layout with sidebar, TanStack Query client, Zustand store scaffolding, and helper tooltip system.

tasks.description: Initialize Vite 8 + React 19 + TypeScript project with Tailwind CSS 4.2
tasks.acceptance: Dev server starts and renders blank page

tasks.description: Implement Everforest color palette as CSS custom properties with dark/light toggle
tasks.acceptance: Theme switches between dark and light mode

tasks.description: Build AppLayout with sidebar navigation, header, and content area
tasks.acceptance: Layout renders with working sidebar links

tasks.description: Implement vim-style keyboard navigation system with useKeyboardNav hook
tasks.acceptance: hjkl navigation works, ? shows shortcut overlay

tasks.description: Set up TanStack Query client and Zustand project store
tasks.acceptance: API calls use query client, active project persists in store

tasks.description: Create typed API client wrapper with base URL config
tasks.acceptance: API client handles errors and returns typed responses

acceptance: SPA loads with Everforest dark theme
Theme toggle switches between dark and light
TanStack Query and Zustand stores are functional
